name: illuminate
description: Dense source(s) in. Self-contained interactive HTML out. MULTI-SOURCE FRONT DOOR (Part J): reads the whole input set and decides — a related bundle synthesizes into ONE artifact (single cross-document governing thought, deduplicated, reconciled, provenance per source document), unrelated inputs stay SEPARATE. Output is a single offline file, internally MULTI-PAGE by default (hash-routed, one view at a time, page set = the derived structure). Form follows source: the macro-structure is derived from the source's epistemic shape (pyramid / debate-map / causal-web / timeline / tree / architecture / matrix), not imposed. Three-stage arc: salience-gated signal extraction, structure selection + adversarial audit, and a composed editorial artifact built to an explicit [ILLUMINATE:ARTDIR] art-direction contract (designed palette not a default, self-hosted typeface not system-ui, tight radii, one accent; named cheap tells hard-fail the render gate), with a global evidence drawer, argument-selected components, developed nested pages, rendered code/config, and high-fidelity CSS-drawn mockups that read as renders. Symmetric fidelity (no fabrication, no reductive compression); verification earned not manufactured; no interaction theater; no parallax; render-truth verified in pixels.
author: marcomorettim

examples.output: Single-file HTML: SCQA hero, GT typewriter, 4 MECE Key Lines, salience-gated evidence drawer, editorial ASCII, confidence meters
Chapter-by-chapter synthesis with cross-chapter SYNTHESIS signals, counter-intuitive INSIGHT callouts, issue tree
Codebase provenance chain: L0→L4 translation layers as interactive evolution arc

capabilities.stage_1: SOURCE-SET ASSESSMENT front door (Part J): with >1 input, cluster on shared entities/subject/timeframe/purpose and emit [ILLUMINATE:SOURCESET] — a related bundle (≥2 docs) synthesizes into ONE artifact (single cross-document governing thought, overlaps deduplicated, conflicts reconciled/surfaced, every trace attributed to its source document S-<doc><n>), unrelated inputs render as SEPARATE artifacts; forced-merge and missed-merge are both named failure modes; then run the pipeline once per cluster. 6-tag signal stratification (SOURCE/INSIGHT/METRIC/PRINCIPLE/SYNTHESIS/GAP), 3-angle extraction, per-source salience gate (KEEP/CONTEXT/CUT against the source thesis; mandatory cut-list), provenance audit
capabilities.stage_2: Structure Selection (shape catalog: pyramid / debate-map / causal-web / timeline / tree / architecture / matrix — derived from the source's epistemic shape, arity matches the source), hub detection, issue tree, the derived structure built to spec, generalized 3-skeptic audit on the structure's joints
capabilities.stage_3: Single self-contained file, internally MULTI-PAGE by default (Part F): hash-routed one-view-at-a-time app, page set = derived arity, View Transitions behind @supports, deep-linkable pages, global persistent evidence drawer + controls; single-scroll is the reserved exception for a genuinely linear argument (declared in [ILLUMINATE:FORMAT]); no parallax. Editorial craft bar binding regardless of palette (rounded-card SaaS-dashboard look is a failure mode). DEVELOP-DON'T-SKELETONIZE (Part G): each concept page is developed (parts/variants/mechanisms/edge-cases) via nesting, never 'title + one component + whitespace'; technical artifacts (AMPscript, SQL, schemas, config) render as CODE-CONFIG, not prose; mockups use medium-correct consistent chrome and never overflow; a hard per-page RENDER-TRUTH gate verifies pixels (no overflow/empty-diagram/whitespace-page/console-error), not source. Components SELECTED per argument — the single most load-bearing artifact renders as the fullest fidelity mockup, branching processes render as real branches. ART DIRECTION (Part H): explicit [ILLUMINATE:ARTDIR] contract before build — designed high-contrast palette (banned: beige+terracotta+pastel default), self-hosted real typeface (banned: system-ui), monochrome headlines (banned: two-tone accent-word titles), tight radii, one accent, composed editorial infographics (banned: pastel auto-flowchart), mockups that read as renders with drawn status glyphs; no interaction theater (a control performs its effect or is not offered — export confirms only on the real event); render-truth extends to finish + behavior, verified in pixels. ENFORCEMENT (Part H6, not guidance): neutral `swiss` palette is the default (warm-cream+terracotta banned as a default), text/display tokens forbid `system-ui`/`-apple-system`/`SF Pro` and self-host a real grotesque (embedded Nimbus Sans woff2), no accent-colored heading words, ink-on-paper diagram nodes (no pastel fills), and a build-BLOCKING [ILLUMINATE:RENDERGATE] fails on any clip/banned-palette/forbidden-font/colored-heading/pastel-node/console-error/unprovable-control. COMPONENT MENU (Part I): a wide source-selected catalog — device mockups, data viz (Sankey/treemap/cohort/candlestick/ticker), diagrams, technical artifacts, editorial — drawn image-free, plus a first-class purposeful MOTION layer (draw-in, count-up, live-tick, step-through) with a reduced-motion static fallback for every animation; the component is chosen to match the source's medium, never defaulting to a phone. shadcn/ui vocabulary, filterable evidence explorer, annotation pins, light/dark, 7 palettes (swiss default), JSON-LD

evidence_contract.ASSERT: only claims that trace to a specific S-NNN signal block entry
evidence_contract.HEDGE: claims where evidence is partial, contested, or version-fragile
evidence_contract.EXCLUDE: claims where the trace cannot be established
